dialogos.texto_en: Ah, Futaro.\nWhere are you going?
I don't really have a specific destination in mind.\nI just wanted to take a leisurely stroll.
I guess you're not with Ichika then.
N-no.\nBut, that's fine.\nIt's free time, right?
Well, that works out perfectly.
What does?
I wanted you to explain what happened this morning.
You've only been giving vague answers\nduring our trip so far.
(Uugh...\n I thought we'd put this matter to rest,\n but they're bringing it up again?)
I'm telling you, there's nothing to explain.\nWe were just out for a run together.
Is that supposed to be an excuse?
It's not an excuse! It's the truth!
But it's hard to believe\nthat you would go for a run so early in the morning\nwhen you came all the way to Okinawa to have fun.
I agree with you, but Ichika invited me\nto join her for a run.\nShe even brought running gear and shoes with her.
...Really?
Really!\nWe were just running, nothing more!
It doesn't seem that you're lying.
Well, it's true that Ichika\nrunning is a part of her daily routine...
Maybe she just wanted to maintain her habits,\neven while traveling.
Ah.
What's up?
Maybe she invited Futaro to go running\nas part of her simulation of living with him.
Ahh, I see.\nIf they start living together, it's also conceivable\nthat they'd share daily routines, right?
I don't think Ichika is just excited, she's serious.
I feel like her idea is a bit outlandish.
Hey, what are you talking about?
After careful deliberation,\nwe have decided that you are not guilty, Futaro.
*sigh* Thank goodness.\nI'm relieved that I wasn't wrongly accused.
So...how was it?
How was what?
Running with Ichika.\nWas there anything especially fun, or\nanything you think could be improved?
...What is this, a product review?\nWhy are you asking me that?
It's for future reference.
I don't know what you could be referencing for,\nbut, well...
I was just tired, really.
Only that?
After all, exercising in the morning is tough.\nIt's not really my thing.
You should really consider building up your stamina.\nWhen you live alone,\nyou'll have limited people to rely on.
I know, but some things are just tough.\nYou understand that, don't you, Miku?
I understand.\nRunning in the morning is like a game of punishment.
Miku, should I ask Ichika\nto take you running with her from time to time?
D-don't do that...
Anyway, now that the suspicion against me is cleared,\ncan we put this topic to rest?
Yes, now that we know the truth, I feel relieved.
So, what should we do next?\nIt doesn't seem like we'll be able to see\nwhat we wanted to today.
I thought Ichika was amazing.\nNormally, not everyone can do that every day.
You seem indifferent, Futaro.
No, I'm actually talking about Ichika, not me.
...You haven't realized it yet.
Huh?
No. You don't need to know.
Ichika is a hard worker,\nso you should learn from her, Futaro.
Anyway, now that the suspicion against me is cleared,\ncan we put this topic to rest?
Yes, now that we know the truth, I feel relieved.
So, what should we do next?\nIt doesn't seem like we'll be able to see\nwhat we wanted to today.
It was a little fun.
Oh, I see.
That's unexpected.\nI never thought I'd hear Uesugi-kun say that exercise was fun.
Well, the first thing I felt was exhaustion, you know?\nBut I also felt refreshed.
I won't overdo it with running every day,\nbut a little bit of running\nfor a change of pace might be good too.
That's a good idea!\nWhy don't you make it a daily routine like Ichika?
That's right.\nI recommend doing it on a daily basis like her.
I'll think about it.\nI am honestly considering building up my stamina.
The fact that even\nYOU are positively considering exercise\nshows that Ichika's efforts have paid off a bit.
Anyway, now that the suspicion against me is cleared,\ncan we put this topic to rest?
Yes, now that we know the truth, I feel relieved.
So, what should we do next?\nIt doesn't seem like we'll be able to see\nwhat we wanted to today.
What did you want to see?
The dolphin show.\nApparently, there's a pool specifically for it.
It seems like it's a break between shows...\nHow unlucky.
That's too bad.\nWell, there are other things to see, so if we\nlook around, we might find something interesting.
Yes, let's do that.
